meaning: adj.(意大利作曲家)威尔地的,威尔地音乐的 n.威尔地崇拜者 威尔地音乐演奏者
examples: The Cape Verdian referee had to be sheilded by security in the middle of the pitch as furious Masry players confronted officials.
Captain Mejdi Ben Mohamed scored from close range in the 48th minute after Cape Verdian import Ja had his initial shot blocked and the rebound fell perfectly for Ben Mohamed.
